(3) block:r2:3 — §19 lines 1397/1400 now cite `NonlinearDiffInvariance.diff_invariance_a4_iff_dirac_basis_consistent` (biconditional) and `NonlinearDiffInvariance.perturbed_pathB_residual_a4_eq_delta_R_sq` (constructive perturbation residual); both confirmed PRESENT in lean_deps.json. (4) block:r2:4 — paper_draft.tex now contains inline `\begin{thebibliography}{99}` block with 61 \bibitem entries; paper_draft.log scan returns 0 'Citation undefined' warnings; all 59 unique cite-keys used in body resolve to a bibitem; CITATION_REGISTRY membership check (re-run on src/core/citations.py) returns 0 missing of 59 unique cites (registry now 495 keys, was 459). 2 cite-key renames verified: `KaulMajumdar2000` and `BergesSexty2008` both appear correctly in body and bibitem block. Round-3 post-fix scan for new TN drifts: §19 region (lines 1370-1410) clean — only the 7 expected qualified names. Single in-body unqualified `CFL_emergent_Z3_matches_QCD_center_Z3` at line 1216 was already passing in round-2 (canonical CFLChiralLagrangian.CFL_emergent_Z3_matches_QCD_center_Z3 PRESENT) and is not a new drift introduced by round-3. Verdict GREEN: 0 BLOCKERs. The 5 carryover advisories from round-2 (HD HYPOTHESIS_REGISTRY enumeration; IA GW170817 14-orders vs 7×10^14 alternation; SD §18 ceilings citation; cross-bundle L1/L3 character-for-character; D4 §7 cross-anchor) all carry forward to non_blocking_followups.
